title: Shag rug
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''shag rug''' was an expensive rug. [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] had a number of these rugs onboard her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the [[Last Chance (YT-1300 light freighter)/Legends|''Last Chance'']].<ref name="Imperial Double-Cross">''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Imperial Double-Cross]]''
